steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The text says many countries began allowing foreign investors to purchase shares "in the 1980s and 1990s." The question asks what year India made that change. The answer must come directly from the table.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — '1981': this is another country's year in the table, not India's. ✗
  • Choice B — '1998': not India's value in the table. 1998 also falls outside the 1980s, making it suspicious as a trap for the "1990s" part of the text. ✗
  • Choice C — '1983': another country's year in the table, not India's. ✗
  • Choice D — '1986': the table shows 1986 for India. This falls within the 1980s period stated in the text. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
